calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Combellack appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Mr. Combellack addressed the issue of fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Continued To Dec-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Ward specially appearing by Court Call for David Combellack, Counsel for Randy Hellesvig.

The Court stated that the report of status of administration would have been pre-granted on July 23, 2013 had Counsel provided an order. The Court informed Ms. Ward that the rule requires that a proposed order be provided with the petition. Ms. Ward requested a sixty day continuance. The matter was continued to December 17, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it would issue an order requesting that the petition for final distribution or status report be filed. If the petition is filed prior to the December 17, 2013 date then the status will go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or To Approve Status Report
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or To Approve Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To May-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A notice of rescheduled status hearing will be sent out by the Court to all Parties. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to May 1, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.
